name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability

labels: enhancement

## Problem / use case

<!-- What are you trying to do? What is missing or painful today?
     Concrete operator/streamer scenarios are very helpful. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Optional. If you already have an idea of how this should work,
     describe it. UI sketches, wireframes, or example overlay
     screenshots welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Optional. Other approaches you thought about and why they fall
     short. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else: links to similar features in other tools,
     references, related issues. -->
